asset_name: Attribute Warning Icon Set — eight elemental states
shared_properties: Uses the project core palette copy #D4AF37/#2B1B17/#00FFFF.
Each icon state fits the documented 40x40 px warning size.
Icon is readable during the 0.5 second warning beat near the enemy slot.
differences: This file carries fire, water, thunder, wind, ice, poison, light, and dark states.
Each state swaps only the symbol fill and attribute accent while preserving the same gold frame and navy plate.

reference_images.label: duel_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Ground warning-icon scale near the enemy slot.

reference_images.label: source_gdd
reference_images.purpose: Ground 40x40 px attribute icon size and 0.5 second pre-launch warning role.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load assets/art/reflect_academy/trial_5/ui_attribute_warning_icon_40x40.png with AssetServer during Loading state and store the handle under ui_attribute_warning_icon_40x40.
runtime_notes: Create an 8-column TextureAtlasLayout for the eight elemental states.
Anchor the icon to the overlay camera at x=1500 y=180 while warning is active.
Swap frames from the incoming spell attribute enum before projectile spawn.

context.usage: Appears for the pre-launch forecast beat and changes frame by incoming projectile attribute.

shape.silhouette: Square gold-framed icon plate with an elemental glyph centered on a navy field.

acceptance_criteria: State sheet canvas is exactly 320x40 px with eight 40x40 states.
Each elemental glyph stays inside a 24x24 px safe area centered in the frame.
Frame border remains #D4AF37 at 2 px thickness in all eight states.
